steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice most effectively uses information from the notes to specify the test site's climate. The notes state the site has "a subtropic climate with winter rain."

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'mentions the test site without specifying climate': Refers to the location but doesn't name the climate type. ✗
  • Choice B — 'mentions the test site without specifying climate': Same problem — no climate specification. ✗
  • Choice C — 'a subtropic climate with winter rain': Directly states the climate from the notes, word for word. ✓
  • Choice D — 'mentions the test site without specifying climate': Doesn't name the climate type at all. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
